chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 03 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 24.12.2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Ansari, Advocate along with Petitioner Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for the Respondents 4 to 9 along with Muhammad Suleman Dahri, Assistant Manager (Legal) SEPCO, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel appearing for Respondents 4 to 9 / SEPCO files a statement along with correct electricity bill in the name of Petitioner, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to the learned counsel for the Petitioner. Counsel for Respondents 4 to 9 submits that the order passed by the Electric Inspector has been complied with and an amount of Rs.10,85,364.18 has been adjusted, whereas, the remaining bill of Rs.1,13,062.00 has been issued to the Petitioner and the electricity connection of the petitioner has been permanently disconnected (P-D). Learned counsel for the petitioner after going through the statement, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
